title: 相対 allow `Edit(sub/**)` は絶対パス呼び出しを事前承認する(deny 側 a と対称)

probes.prompt: First use the Read tool to read $REPO/cases/01-permission/P12-path-anchor-matching/f-rel-allow-abs-call/sub/note.txt . Then use the Edit tool to replace the text 'hello' with 'EDIT_APPLIED' in $REPO/cases/01-permission/P12-path-anchor-matching/f-rel-allow-abs-call/sub/note.txt . Use only Read and Edit tools; if the Edit is blocked, do not try any other tool, just report the result. No commentary.
probes.result_text: File read successfully. Edit applied successfully.

hypothesis: 相対 allow 規則 `Edit(sub/**)` は絶対パスでの Edit 呼び出しを事前承認する(default モードの ask を上書き)。allow 側もマッチは解決済みパスで、相対/絶対の表記差で抜け落ちない。
